# CDiscourse — Current Status

> **MCP cutover gate semantics are normalized in `docs/designs/OPS-MCP-CUTOVER-GATE-CRITERIA-CONSOLIDATION.md` (2026-06-03).** Where this file's older cutover wording conflicts, that canonical doc controls. Key invariants: PASS-LOAD = **0 terminal dead-letters at N=56**; the percentage ramp is **launch-time, operator-card-gated — not a scheduled ladder**; `PASS-STAGE-1-PLUMBING / INSUFFICIENT-ORGANIC-VOLUME` is **strictly weaker** than an organic `PASS-STAGE-1` and **does not authorize 5%**; the 62/63 Family-F run is a **target-mitigation pass, not a global PASS-LOAD**; H/I/J stay `productionEnabled:false`.

<!-- Latest implementer card: ADMIN-CONV-INACTIVE-VISIBILITY-001 (hide inactive rooms from Browse Arguments gallery + default-hide inactive rooms in Admin > Arguments behind a Show-inactives toggle) — follow-up to #514, pure `src/**` + `__tests__/**` + this status note. NO migration. #514 deployed DEBATE-level inactivation; the `debates` SELECT RLS policy (migration 20260606000001) already gates every NON-admin arm on `inactive_at IS NULL`, so regular users never receive inactive rooms. This card closes two pure-src gaps in the ADMIN views (whose admin RLS arm is unrestricted). PART A — gallery: (1) `src/features/debates/types.ts` `Debate` gains `inactiveAt?: string | null` + `DebateRow` gains `inactive_at: string | null` (§10a: WHAT only — NO `inactive_reason` field anywhere); (2) `src/features/debates/debatesApi.ts` `listDebates`/`createDebate` SELECT now includes `inactive_at` (never `inactive_reason`) and `mapDebateRow` maps `inactiveAt: row.inactive_at ?? null`; (3) `src/features/debates/conversationGalleryModel.ts` `buildConversationGalleryCards` now SKIPS debates with non-null `inactiveAt` (`if ((debate.inactiveAt ?? null) !== null) continue;`) — defense-in-depth that removes inactive rooms from the admin gallery UI (RLS already hides them from non-admins). PART B — Admin > Arguments: (4) the `roomGroups` memo now drops groups whose `isDebateInactive` is true when the EXISTING `includeInactives` toggle is off (`includeInactives ? grouped : grouped.filter((g) => !g.isDebateInactive)`), with `includeInactives` added to the dep array — the prior per-ARGUMENT SQL predicate did not cover whole-room (#514) inactivation; (5) the Show-inactives control was recast from inert-reading status text into a CLEARLY VISIBLE BUTTON (`accessibilityRole="button"`, `accessibilityState={{ selected: includeInactives }}`, a visible checkbox-style indicator, plain "Show inactives" / "Showing inactives" copy, `hitSlop` for ≥44×44, testID `admin-arguments-show-inactives-toggle`). §10a held throughout: only `inactive_at` (the WHAT) is threaded — never `inactive_reason` (the WHY) — in the SELECT, the types, the gallery, or the admin list. +22 tests (gallery debate-level skip incl. mixed-list + absent-field + §10a poisoned-fixture; debatesApi `inactive_at`→`inactiveAt` round-trip + SELECT-includes-`inactive_at`-not-`inactive_reason` scan + §10a poisoned row; AdminArgumentsTab source-scan for the room-level filter + the button toggle + pure-model `isDebateInactive`-drives-hide incl. toggle-off-hides / toggle-on-reveals / §10a poisoned group). Three existing tests updated IN-PLACE (not relaxed): `AdminArgumentsTab.inactive.test.tsx` toggle role switch→button + selected state; `AdminArgumentsTab.roomGrouping.test.tsx` grouping-call regex made newline-tolerant (call wrapped to apply the filter). Test delta (full suite, captured exit 0): 20301 → 20323 total / 20322 passing / 1 pre-existing skip (unchanged); 687 suites unchanged. (The `moveMetadataLedger.test.ts:1210` `elapsed < 60ms` perf assertion flaked once under full-suite CPU saturation then passed on re-run + passes 49/49 in isolation — unrelated.) Typecheck + lint clean (exit 0). Files: `src/features/debates/types.ts`, `src/features/debates/debatesApi.ts`, `src/features/debates/conversationGalleryModel.ts`, `src/features/admin/AdminArgumentsTab.tsx`, `__tests__/conversationGalleryModel.test.ts`, `__tests__/debatesApi.visibility.test.ts`, `__tests__/AdminArgumentsTab.roomInactivate.test.tsx`, `__tests__/AdminArgumentsTab.inactive.test.tsx`, `__tests__/AdminArgumentsTab.roomGrouping.test.tsx`, this status note. NO migration, NO Edge, NO supabase/**, NO engine.ts, NO familyRegistry.ts, NO routing/production flag, NO classifier/AI/MCP invocation, NO new dependency, NO inactive_reason exposure, NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO secret printed. -->

<!-- Latest implementer card: CARD-VIEW-REFINE-001 (contain + horizontal active Cards card; ←/→ + swipe nav; inline "Actions on this point"; denser per-node feedback) — UI / LAYOUT, pure `src/**` + `__tests__/**` + this status note. Refines #516 / #518 / #531 on the active `ArgumentBubbleStack` Cards surface. FOUR operator asks, landed containment-first. (1) CONTAINMENT — the active card was absolutely positioned + vertically CENTERED in the stage (no maxHeight/overflow), so a tall always-visible `CardDetailPanel` overflowed top+bottom and the top bled into the masthead. `ArgumentBubbleStack.tsx` `stage` `justifyContent: 'center' → 'flex-start'` (top-anchored → overflow grows DOWN only) + `overflow:'hidden'`; the stage height is measured via `onLayout` and threaded to the ACTIVE `ArgumentBubbleCard` as `maxHeight` (+ `overflow:'hidden'`), and the panel region is wrapped in a `ScrollView` so the detail SCROLLS WITHIN the card (containment, NOT a tap-to-reveal disclosure — every section still renders without a tap; the #14 visible-by-default invariant holds). The 3-col layout (web ≥1024) still resolves; horizontal centering preserved. (2) ←/→ + SWIPE — added a document-level `keydown` `useEffect` ACTIVE ONLY in Stack mode (`mode === 'stack'`, `Platform.OS === 'web'`) that routes through the new pure `resolveStackKeyEffect`: ArrowLeft→`handlePrev`, ArrowRight→`handleNext`, Home/End→oldest/newest (chronological — NOT the Timeline DAG nav), bailing when the composer is focused (INPUT/TEXTAREA/contentEditable) or a board menu is open (`boardActVisible||inspectVisible||goVisible`); gated on stack so it never double-fires with the Timeline handler. Swipe via `PanResponder` (RN primitive, NO new dep) on the stage: claims only predominantly-horizontal pans (`shouldClaimStackHorizontalPan` — vertical card-scroll falls through), dispatches Prev/Next on release via `resolveStackSwipeEffect` (48px threshold); tap still activates (`onStartShouldSetPanResponder:false`). New pure model `src/features/arguments/stackKeyboardSwipeModel.ts`. (3) INLINE ACTIONSZONE — new "Actions on this point" zone in the centerpiece of `CardDetailPanel.tsx` (parallel to Evidence/Standing/Lifecycle), rendered ONLY on the active card. DOCTRINE: these chips are real `Pressable`s ON PURPOSE — they are USER MOVES governed by the Constitution engine (reply/disagree/join/share), NOT classifier/AI verdicts; the display-only/no-verdict rule (§1/§4) applies to AI flags + classifier/tag chips, which STAY non-interactive. The set is derived from the EXISTING `getRailActions(viewerRole, bubbleActor)` (single source of truth — inline + rail can never diverge), grouped by `RAIL_ACTION_CATEGORY_LABEL`, dispatched through the SAME `handleRailAction` path (so join/share/watch resolve identically to the rail). Empty for own-bubble (deep set stays in Act — inline is the high-frequency subset). a11y ≥44×44 + helper→`accessibilityHint`. Plumbed `viewerRole`+`onRailAction` ArgumentGameSurface → Stack → Card → Panel. (4) DENSER FEEDBACK (layout, NOT new eval) — family classifier blocks now spread into HORIZONTAL chip strips that WRAP (were vertical); the evidence span renders INLINE beside the label in the wide layout; the SOURCE-PROVENANCE badge (`mark.source`) is now RENDERED on the card via a new plain-language `sourceProvenanceLabel` map (auto_metadata→"From system metadata", … — the raw snake_case code is NEVER shown; unknown→suppressed). Families A–G only; H/I/J stay GATED OUT (never surfaced). Confidence stays PIPS; advisory framing + verdict-token ban-list + no snake_case preserved. +5 test files / +45 tests: `stackKeyboardSwipeModel.test.ts` (key+swipe+claim resolvers), `cardViewRefine.test.tsx` (ActionsZone actor-aware + Pressable dispatch + display-only classifier/tag chips stay non-interactive + a11y + ban-list; provenance badge + horizontal strip + PIPS + H/I/J absent), `cardViewRefineContainmentNav.test.tsx` (stage top-anchored+overflow, active-card maxHeight+ScrollView+#14-visible, 3-col ≥1024, keydown + PanResponder + no-route source scans), `cardClassifierProvenance.test.ts` (provenance map plain-language/suppression/ban-list, markToChip wiring). No existing test relaxed; inherited `CardDetailPanel.test.tsx` / `CardDetailHubPanel.test.tsx` pass unchanged (ActionsZone is gated on the active-card props those display-only renders omit). Test delta (full suite, captured exit 0): 683 → 687 suites / 20255 → 20300 passing / 1 pre-existing skip (unchanged) → 20301 total (+4 suites / +45 passing). Typecheck + lint clean. Files: `src/features/arguments/ArgumentBubbleStack.tsx`, `ArgumentBubbleCard.tsx`, `ArgumentGameSurface.tsx`, `stackKeyboardSwipeModel.ts` (new), `cardView/CardDetailPanel.tsx`, `cardView/cardClassifierStripModel.ts`, + 4 new test files + this status note. `composerDockNoRoute` / `inRoomNoRoute` still pass (the keydown is a document listener, NOT a router); §10a no `inactive_reason`; Build 1 (mapping evaluator / combination / cross-family / HiTODS / Graham / Walton — gated on #530) NOT attempted. NO migration, NO Edge, NO supabase/**, NO engine.ts, NO familyRegistry.ts, NO routing/production flag, NO router import, NO classifier/provider/AI invocation, NO H/I/J surfaced, NO new dependency, NO inactive_reason exposure, NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO secret printed. -->

<!-- Latest implementer card: ADMIN-CONV-INACTIVE-001 (room-header conversation inactivation on Admin > Arguments) — UI extension on the #514/PR-514 branch (the #514 DEBATE-level migration + Edge + standalone AdminDebatesTab already exist on the branch). This card adds a ROOM-level (whole-conversation) inactivation affordance at the room-group HEADER of the EXISTING AdminArgumentsTab (#508 room grouping), DISTINCT from the retained per-statement (per-argument) inactivation. Pure `src/**`. (1) LOADER (`adminArgumentsApi.ts`): the `debates(...)` embed now selects the DEBATE-level `inactive_at` — `debates(title, inactive_at)` — and threads `debateInactiveAt: string | null` onto `AdminArgumentRow`. It NEVER selects `debates.inactive_reason` / `debates.inactive_by` (doctrine §10a: the badge shows WHAT, never WHY). `arguments` has exactly one FK to `debates`, so the bare `debates(...)` embed is unambiguous; admins read all debate rows via the #514 `is_moderator_or_admin()` SELECT arm, so no RLS gap. (2) MODELS: `ArtifactSourceRow`/`ArgumentArtifact` (`argumentArtifactModel.ts`) carry an optional `debateInactiveAt` threaded from the latest revision's source row; `AdminArgumentRoomGroup` (`adminArgumentsRoomGroupingModel.ts`) derives `debateInactiveAt` (first non-null among the group's artifacts) + `isDebateInactive` (`debateInactiveAt !== null`) — the WHOLE-room state, DISTINCT from the existing per-statement `isInactive` fold. Pure/deterministic; never reads any reason. (3) UI (`AdminArgumentsTab.tsx` room-group header): a ROOM checkbox (`admin-arguments-room-select-<roomId>`) in a SEPARATE `selectedRoomIds` scope (not the per-argument `selectedIds`); inline per-room "Mark room inactive" / "Mark room active" (`admin-arguments-room-inactivate-<roomId>` / `admin-arguments-room-activate-<roomId>`) wired to `markDebateInactive(roomId)` / `markDebateActive(roomId)`; a ROOM bulk bar (`admin-arguments-rooms-bulk-bar`) when ≥1 room selected → `bulkMarkDebateInactive` / `bulkMarkDebateActive` (capped at `ADMIN_BULK_DEBATE_INACTIVE_ID_CAP`=100, with a confirm dialog + optional admin note); a text-only "Conversation inactive" badge from `isDebateInactive` (`inactive_at`-only, never a reason). All actions are real Pressables (role=button/checkbox, accessibilityState, ≥44px hit target / hitSlop); the existing expand/collapse header Pressable is preserved as a sibling. The per-ARGUMENT selection + per-row Mark inactive/active + argument bulk bar are RETAINED, visually + behaviorally distinct from the room scope. On success each action re-fetches (consistent with the per-argument refresh). Wired to the existing `adminDebatesInactiveApi` (no service-role in client). +37 tests across 4 new/extended areas: `adminArgumentsRoomGroupingModel.test.ts` (+7 — debate-level derivation, independence from the per-statement fold, no-reason, determinism), `argumentArtifactModel.test.ts` (+4 — debateInactiveAt threading, distinct from per-arg inactiveAt, no-reason), `__tests__/adminArgumentsDebateInactiveEmbed.test.ts` (new, 8 — loader embed includes inactive_at + forbids reason/by), `__tests__/AdminArgumentsTab.roomInactivate.test.tsx` (new, 22 — room checkbox + per-room + bulk wiring to debate wrappers + badge + per-argument retention), `__tests__/adminArgumentsDebateReasonNeverRendered.test.ts` (new, §10a poisoned-fixture — loader maps inactive_at, drops a poisoned debate reason; full pipeline surfaces isDebateInactive without the poison). One existing `adminArguments.test.ts` embed-shape assertion updated in place (not relaxed) from `debates(title)` to `debates(title, inactive_at)` + strengthened to forbid the debate reason/by in the embed; two existing artifact fixture builders gained the new `debateInactiveAt: null` default. THR-4 FIRST FULL VERIFICATION POST-MERGE: full `npm test` from the worktree = **Test Suites: 676 passed / 676 total · Tests: 20073 passed + 1 pre-existing skip = 20074 total** (captured exit 0). Typecheck + lint clean (exit 0). (A single load-sensitive perf-timing assertion in `moveMetadataLedger.test.ts:1210` [`elapsed < 60ms`] flaked once under 676-suite parallel CPU saturation, then passed on re-run and passes 49/49 in isolation — unrelated to this change.) Files: `src/features/admin/adminArgumentsApi.ts`, `src/features/admin/types.ts`, `src/features/arguments/argumentArtifactModel.ts`, `src/features/admin/adminArgumentsRoomGroupingModel.ts`, `src/features/admin/AdminArgumentsTab.tsx`, + 3 new test files + 3 existing test files touched. NO new migration, NO new Edge, NO migration/Edge edit, NO supabase/** change, NO service-role in client, NO inactive_reason exposure, NO provider/AI call, NO new dependency, NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO secret printed. -->

<!-- Earlier implementer card: NAV-START-ARGUMENT-001 Slice A (taxonomy + Start Argument page + route aliases) — issue #524, UI + pure-model, pure `src/**` + `__tests__/**`. <!-- Latest implementer card: CARD-VIEW-DETAIL-HUB-001 Slice 3 (comparison-style centerpiece + responsive multi-column + #14 disclosure regression) — UI / LAYOUT + visual refinement, pure `src/**`, VISIBLE BY DEFAULT (no Card expand). Operator 2026-06-06 refinement on top of the ratified Slices 1+2. The active/current message card is now the OBVIOUS CENTERPIECE; the replied-to PARENT renders as an off-center, above-centerpiece COMPARISON bubble in the parent's ACTOR/SIDE color (DIFFERENT from the centerpiece) so the two parties contrast — color encodes actor, NEVER a verdict (timeline-grammar). New shared-model additions in `src/features/arguments/detail/argumentDetailModel.ts`: `ACTOR_BUBBLE_COLOR` + `actorBubbleColor` (mirrors the Timeline `actorTone`: self=cyan/other=indigo/bot=purple/admin=amber/unknown=slate), `DetailParentComparisonBubble` + `buildParentComparisonBubble` (italic quote inside quote marks ≤120, plain-language actor label, `#N · kind` reference, degrade to `kind:'none'` for root/soft-deleted/RLS-hidden/out-of-slice → NO bubble, NEVER a "hidden because…" reason; the reference is a real Pressable button only when ordinal AND id resolve, else display-only — no dangling affordance), and the responsive helper `hubColumnLayout(width, platformOs)` (+ `HUB_READING_ORDER`, `HUB_WIDE_LAYOUT_WIDTH_THRESHOLD`=1024): web ≥1024 → 3 columns (tags · centerpiece · classifier, centerpiece visually centered); narrow web + ALL native → single stacked column; SAME sections in BOTH (none dropped); SR reading order ALWAYS centerpiece→classifier→tags. `cardDetailModel.ts` adds `parentComparison` to `CardDetailViewModel` + 5 optional additive inputs (parentOrdinal/parentKindLabel/parentMessageId/parentActor/parentActorLabel; #516-era callers omit → degrade). `CardDetailPanel.tsx` restructured into 3 regions (centerpiece = parent comparison bubble ABOVE off-center + elevated centerpiece card with S/T/H + evidence + standing + lifecycle; classifier column; tags column) wrapped in the responsive container; the Slice-2 inline parent-quote zone is REMOVED so the parent appears once (as the bubble); the MCP feedback is presented as stylized flags/labels/helpers/banners (plain-language family headings, advisory caption banner, confidence PIPS, doctrine-grouped tag blocks) — no new classifier data, no model call. The Card has NO expand affordance (ratified §7.1); the only Card Pressables are navigation (comparison-bubble reference + step-ref token). `windowWidth` threaded ArgumentGameSurface → ArgumentBubbleStack → ArgumentBubbleCard → CardDetailPanel; parent actor/ordinal/kind/actorLabel/id read off the already-computed `timelineMap` + parent bubble view-model (NO fetch). +2 test files / +43 tests: `hubColumnLayout.test.ts` (23 — breakpoint ≥1024/narrow/native/degenerate, same-sections-both-layouts, stable reading order, actor color grammar distinct+total, buildParentComparisonBubble happy/degrade/no-dangling-ref/120-truncate) and `cardDetailComparisonLayout.test.tsx` (20 — bubble above+off-center, distinct color vs centerpiece, italic+quoted, reference button → onActivateAncestor(parentId), degrade→no bubble, responsive 3-col vs stacked same sections, #14 Card-all-visible-NO-expand-NO-accessibilityState.expanded + Timeline-STILL-tap-to-reveal source scan, grayscale/PIPS/advisory-caption, verdict-token ban-list + no-snake_case recursive over rendered strings). Inherited `CardDetailHubPanel.test.tsx` (Slice 2) updated IN PLACE — the 4 parent-quote-zone assertions now assert the comparison-bubble behavior (replaced, not weakened); all other inherited suites pass unchanged (THR-4 — no skip/relax). Test delta (full suite, captured exit 0): 666 → 668 suites / 19864 → 19907 passing / 1 pre-existing skip (unchanged) → 19908 total (+2 suites / +43 passing). Typecheck + lint clean. Design doc §6.7 + §7 (new §7.0) revised for the operator refinement; ratified invariants intact. Pure `src/**` + design-doc edit only — NO migration, NO Edge, NO supabase/**, NO engine.ts, NO familyRegistry.ts edit, NO new fetch/read path, NO provider/AI call, NO mutation/moderation handler, NO Card expand/disclosure, NO inactive_reason exposure, NO secret printed. See `docs/designs/CARD-VIEW-DETAIL-HUB-001.md` §6.7 / §7 / §11 Slice 3. -->

<!-- Earlier implementer card: OPS-ADMIN-ARGS-WEB-WIDTH-001 — Admin Arguments + Debate list tables fill the width on wide web/Chromium viewports. LAYOUT-ONLY, pure `src/**`. Bug: both tables wrapped their horizontal `ScrollView` in `contentContainerStyle={{ minWidth: TABLE_WIDTH }}` (AdminArgumentsTab TABLE_WIDTH≈1362; DebateListScreen≈928); the content container respected `minWidth` but did NOT stretch on a wider viewport, so the table pinned to TABLE_WIDTH and the rest of a wide window was empty/black. FIX: new pure helper `src/lib/responsiveTable.ts` exports `tableFillContentContainerStyle(tableWidth) → { minWidth: tableWidth, flexGrow: 1 }` (grows to fill when wider, scrolls when narrower) + `flexTableColumnStyle(width) → { flexGrow: 1, flexShrink: 0, flexBasis: width, minWidth: width }` (the flexible content column absorbs the slack but never shrinks below its base width on a narrow viewport). Both screens now feed the outer ScrollView's `contentContainerStyle` through the fill helper, and the **Debate / Argument** content column (the natural slack-absorber) uses `flexTableColumnStyle(COL.debate)` in BOTH its header cell (via a new `flexFill` prop on the local `PlainHeader`) and its body cell, so header/body column widths stay in lockstep and nothing misaligns when the column flexes. No `Platform.OS` branching (flex primitives only). No column-order / room-grouping (#508) / per-row content / sort / filter / data change. No new dependency. New test suite `__tests__/responsiveTableFill.test.ts` (+15 tests / +1 suite): unit-tests both helpers (wide→fill, narrow→min-scroll, header/body base-width parity) + source-string wiring assertions for both screens (content-container helper used, bare `minWidth`-only style removed, Debate column flexes in header + body). All existing AdminArguments / DebateList suites pass UNCHANGED (THR-4 — no skip/relax). Test delta (full suite, captured exit 0): 665 → 666 suites / 19849 → 19864 passing / 1 pre-existing skip (unchanged) → 19865 total (+1 suite / +15 passing). Typecheck + lint clean. Files: `src/lib/responsiveTable.ts` (new), `src/features/admin/AdminArgumentsTab.tsx`, `src/features/debates/DebateListScreen.tsx`, `__tests__/responsiveTableFill.test.ts` (new). NO migration, NO Edge, NO supabase/**, NO engine.ts, NO new fetch/provider/AI call, NO data-logic change, NO new dependency, NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO secret printed. -->

<!-- Latest implementer card: CARD-VIEW-DETAIL-HUB-001 Slice 2 (Cards hub — parent quote, plain-language Standing/Tone/Heat strip, all-families A–G-gated family-grouped classifiers, full tags) — UI / content + data, VISIBLE BY DEFAULT (no expand; the responsive multi-column LAYOUT + the formal #14 disclosure-regression test are Slice 3). Builds on the Slice-1 shared module `src/features/arguments/detail/argumentDetailModel.ts`. (ask v) The band formatters `formatStandingLine`/`formatToneLine`/`formatHeatLine` now emit PLAIN-LANGUAGE — new `TONE_BAND_PLAIN_LABEL` (Calm/Measured/Heated/Hostile/—), `HEAT_BAND_PLAIN_LABEL` (Cool/Mild/Warm/Hot/—), `standingBandPlainLabel` (reuses SW-001 `STANDING_BAND_SOFT_LABEL`); new `buildStandingToneHeatStrip` + `STANDING_TONE_HEAT_CAPTION` "How this message reads" (describes the TEXT, not the author). Because the formatters are SHARED, the Timeline sidecar strip (`ArgumentReplySidecar`) automatically gains the same plain-language copy — an intended small Timeline label-copy improvement (raw band token → plain language); Timeline LAYOUT/disclosure unchanged. NO existing test asserted the old raw band tokens (only local fixture defaults reference them), so no in-place test relaxation was needed. (ask i) New `buildParentQuoteSlice` — italic replied-to quote truncated to `PARENT_BODY_PREVIEW_CAP` (120); soft-deleted/RLS-hidden/out-of-slice parent → neutral "Parent unavailable" placeholder, NEVER an invented quote, NEVER a "hidden because…" reason. (ask iii) New `buildHubClassifierGroups` + `buildHubClassifier`: the all-families, UNCAPPED, per-family-grouped classifier for the hub. The EXPLICIT A–G family allow-list gate (`HUB_PRODUCTION_ENABLED_FAMILIES`) is DERIVED as the complement of the frozen `HUB_NON_PRODUCTION_FAMILIES` (H/I/J, mirroring the Deno `familyRegistry.ts` `productionEnabled:false` set + pinned to `ALL_MACHINE_OBSERVATION_FAMILIES` by test) — NOT a hard-coded A–G code list. Disposition filtering alone is INSUFFICIENT (three Family I `thread_topology` entries — `no_response_after_n_turns`/`repeated_axis_pressure`/`ignored_by_both` — are dispositioned `rendered_now` and PASS `filterMarksBySurface(_, 'selected_context')`); the family gate is the authoritative §10a hub gate, regardless of disposition or future Family-I enablement (#392/#394). New `cardClassifierStripModel.buildHubClassifierMarks` runs steps 1–4 (surface filter + dedupe, NO cap); `markToChip` is exported + reused so chips are byte-identical to the capped strip. Plain-language family headings (`HUB_CLASSIFIER_FAMILY_HEADING`); unknown rawKey → "Other observations" (never the raw code). Confidence stays PIPS; advisory caption stays "What the referee noticed — advisory, not a verdict."; heading is NEUTRAL "Classifier observations" (NEVER "Add Classifier"). (ask ii) New `buildFullTags` — full semantic tags grouped by the §10a doctrine categories: Observations (auto) / Allegations (manual) / Structural labels (dropped-tag qualifiers) / Status (category + lifecycle); all plain-language via the shared semantic-flag chip labels + `toPlainLanguageOrSuppress` (unknown suppressed, no snake_case leak). `cardDetailModel.ts` extends `CardDetailViewModel` + `BuildCardDetailViewModelInput` with the four hub slices + optional additive inputs (#516-era callers omit → safe empty/degrade). `CardDetailPanel.tsx` renders the new zones display-only (`accessibilityRole="text"`), visible by default; the only Pressable remains the step-ref parent token. `ArgumentGameSurface.tsx` threads `parentBodyPreview` (parent node bodyPreview off the already-computed `timelineMap` — NO fetch), the active node + view-model for the S/T/H strip, `structuralTagLabels` (node dropped-tags, defensively filtered via `looksLikeInternalCode`), and the shared semantic-flags section. +5 test files / +57 tests: `hubClassifierGroups.test.ts` (11 — uncapped vs ≤3, per-family grouping, unknown→Other, HARD Family-I `rendered_now` negative proving the family gate, H+J absence, PIPS, neutral heading, derived-not-hard-coded allow-list), `cardDetailHubFullTags.test.ts` (8), `argumentDetailModel.test.ts` (16 — parent-quote present/120-truncate/degrade/out-of-slice, S/T/H plain-language + ban-list, determinism+non-mutation), `CardDetailHubPanel.test.tsx` (9), `cardDetailModel.test.ts` (+13). `argumentDetailParity.test.ts` extended (fork-guard now ALSO catches arrow re-definitions per the Slice-1 reviewer note; new shared builders pinned). **Full suite 665 suites / 19849 passed + 1 pre-existing skip = 19850 total**; typecheck + lint clean. Pure `src/**` only — NO migration, NO Edge, NO supabase/**, NO engine.ts, NO familyRegistry.ts edit, NO new fetch/read path, NO provider/AI call, NO mutation/moderation/"add classifier" handler, NO inactive_reason exposure, NO secret printed. H/I/J never on the hub (family gate authoritative). See `docs/designs/CARD-VIEW-DETAIL-HUB-001.md` §6.4/§6.5/§6.6/§6.7 / §11 Slice 2. -->

<!-- Latest implementer card: CARD-VIEW-DETAIL-HUB-001 Slice 1 (shared argument-detail model — the no-fork foundation) — PURE REFACTOR, UI behavior BYTE-EQUAL, no user-visible change. NOT in this slice (Slice 2/3): parent quote, S/T/H strip, all-families cap-lift, full tags, multi-column layout. **Full suite 661 suites / 19782 passed + 1 pre-existing skip = 19783 total (+24)**; typecheck + lint clean. <!-- Latest implementer card: CARD-VIEW-DATA-001 (Explode argument detail inline on the active Cards view) — UI / presentation-only. The Cards/Stack view was barren (active card showed only header pills + body + timestamp) even though ArgumentGameSurface already computes the full enrichment. This card explodes the Inspect detail inline on the ACTIVE card, visible BY DEFAULT (no tap) — the Cards page is the "data readily loaded and visible by default" surface; the Timeline's tap-to-reveal is untouched. New PURE-TS builder `src/features/arguments/cardView/cardDetailModel.ts` exports `buildCardDetailViewModel(input): CardDetailViewModel { stepReference, categoryLabel, qualifierLabels, classifierStrip, evidence:{sources[],debtSummary?}, standingLabel?, lifecycleLabel?, flagLabels[] }` + `artifactsToEvidenceSources`. Composes the salvaged Slice-1 sub-models `cardStepReferenceModel` + `cardClassifierStripModel` (the latter runs marks through the EXISTING UX-001.5A presentation pipeline at the `selected_context` surface, which auto-drops §10a composer_only/inspect_only marks). Deterministic (no Date.now/Math.random, no mutation). Lifecycle codes route through `toPlainLanguageOrSuppress` AND an explicit forbidden-set so `inactive_reason`/`inactive_by` ("why hidden"/admin-note) NEVER render on the participant card (§1/policy_no_censorship); unknown codes suppressed, not echoed. New component `src/features/arguments/cardView/CardDetailPanel.tsx` renders 8 zones (step-ref, category/qualifier, classifier, evidence, standing, lifecycle, semantic flags) — ALL display-only LABELS (accessibilityRole=\"text\", no button role) EXCEPT the step-reference parent token, the ONLY interactive affordance (real Pressable + role=button + ≥44×44 hitSlop → onActivateAncestor jumps to parent). Confidence shown as PIPS dots, never a raw number. Salvaged + made-compile `cardStepReferenceModel.ts` + `CardStepReferenceHeader.tsx` (the salvaged header put hitSlop on a <Text> → rewrote the token as a genuine inline Pressable). `ArgumentBubbleCard.tsx` accepts optional `cardDetail` + `onActivateAncestor`; renders `CardDetailPanel` only when `vm.isActive && cardDetail != null` (non-active stacked cards stay 3-line compact; the panel's category/qualifier + standing zones supersede the legacy badge row, the step-ref supersedes the legacy parentHint — both only when the panel is shown). `ArgumentBubbleStack.tsx` forwards `activeCardDetail` to the active card only. `ArgumentGameSurface.tsx` builds the model memoized per `activeMessageId` from maps it already holds (persistedObservationsByArgumentId, manualTagsByMessageId, metadataLedger, lifecycleMap, artifactsByMessageId, evidenceDebts, sidecarViewModel semantic_flags, categoryLabelById, active viewModel pointStandingHint/qualifierBadges); ancestor tap reuses the single shared `handleActivate` (no second selection id). NO Timeline/Inspect-popout/engine/submit-argument/migration/Edge change — presentation-only; no new fetch, no service-role, no AI. +29 tests: `__tests__/cardDetailModel.test.ts` (20) and `__tests__/CardDetailPanel.test.tsx` (9). **19758 tests / 660 suites passing**, typecheck + lint clean. NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO migration, NO Edge change, NO Supabase write, NO service-role, NO provider call, NO new dependency, NO secret printed. -->
<!-- Earlier implementer card: #508 (Admin Arguments room/conversation grouping) — UI / presentation-only. Fixes the bug where the Admin → Arguments tab rendered every message in a room as its own top-level row (a 5-message room showed 5 rows, each "0 duplicate runs collapsed"). New PURE-TS model `src/features/admin/adminArgumentsRoomGroupingModel.ts` exports `AdminArgumentRoomGroup` + `groupArtifactsByRoom(artifacts, direction?)`: groups the existing per-argument `ArgumentArtifact[]` by `artifact.debateId` into one collapsible group per room. roomTitle = first non-null `debateTitle` run through `cleanArtifactTitleForDedupe` (strips `[xai-adv …]`/`[stress …]` corpus suffixes); messageCount = artifacts in the group; latestUpdatedAt = max, createdAt = min across the group; isInactive = true ONLY when ALL artifacts inactive (AND-fold of each artifact's `inactiveAt`-derived `isInactive`); latestBodyExcerpt = ≤140-char single-line excerpt of the freshest artifact. Deterministic (no Date.now/Math.random; identical input → JSON-equal output); input not mutated; never reads `inactiveReason` (§10a). `AdminArgumentsTab.tsx` now memoizes `groupArtifactsByRoom(artifactRows…, sortDirection)` and renders a group HEADER per room (Pressable + accessibilityRole="button" + accessibilityState.expanded + minHeight 44 + hitSlop; caret, cleaned title, `{n} messages` count badge, latest-activity timestamp, text-only Inactive badge, muted body-excerpt preview) with the existing per-artifact rows nested + indented under it. DEFAULT: all rooms COLLAPSED (the core fix — one row per conversation). New Expand all / Collapse all controls near the density toolbar. Search + run-source filter + sort still operate on the flat rows BEFORE grouping; a room group appears if any of its artifacts match; sort direction reorders the group headers too. New testIDs: `admin-arguments-room-group-<roomId>`, `admin-arguments-room-group-header-<roomId>`, `admin-arguments-room-group-count-<roomId>`, `admin-arguments-expand-all`, `admin-arguments-collapse-all`. Existing `admin-arguments-table` testID + all per-artifact row content preserved. NO loader / artifact-dedup / run-tag / migration / Edge change (presentation-only). +45 tests: `__tests__/adminArgumentsRoomGroupingModel.test.ts` (26 — empty/degenerate, single+multi room, title cleaned, isInactive AND-fold, direction asc/desc, determinism, non-mutation, excerpt clamp, ban-list) and `__tests__/AdminArgumentsTab.roomGrouping.test.tsx` (19 — source-scan wiring + a11y button + default-collapsed + expand/collapse-all + poisoned inactive-reason fixture). **19729 tests / 658 suites passing**, typecheck + lint clean. NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO migration, NO Edge change, NO Supabase write, NO service-role, NO provider call, NO new dependency, NO secret printed. -->
<!-- Latest implementer card: ADMIN-ARGUMENTS-003 (#469) — UNBLOCKED SLICES ONLY: runTag (room-source) filter + persistable view prefs v1 on the Admin Arguments table. Pure-client; NO Edge, NO migration, NO service-role, NO new dependency, NO provider call. (1) runTag FILTER — new pure-TS classifier `src/features/admin/adminArgumentsRunTagModel.ts` classifies a room into one of six families (`xai_adv` / `ai_corpus` / `stress` / `scenario` / `seed` / `none`) by reading the corpus suffix the runners append to the debate title (`[xai-adv …]` / `[ai-corpus … #s7]` / `[stress …]` / `[scenario-…]` / `[seed-…]` / `[ai-seed-…]`). Works TODAY via the EXISTING `debates(title)` JOIN — no new column, no new query. Forward-compat for #476 (CORPUS-30-RUNTAG-PERSIST): `classifyRunFamily({ debateTitle })` takes an object context so the swap to a durable indexed `run_tag` column is a one-line change at the single call site in the `filtered` memo; the filter UI + `RunFamily` union do not change. Doctrine: the filter is a NAVIGATION/DIAGNOSTIC aid, never a truth/verdict signal — plain-language labels + hints, zero verdict tokens (ban-list tested). New chip row `admin-arguments-runtag-toolbar` (button role, selected state, hint, 44px hitSlop). (2) PERSISTABLE PREFS v1 — new pure-TS model `adminArgumentsPrefsModel.ts` (versioned blob: density / sortField / sortDirection / runTagFilter / participantKind / limit; defensive `mergeWithDefaults`; immutable `applyPrefsPatch`; `densityToCellPaddingY`), `adminArgumentsPrefsStorage.ts` (AsyncStorage glue mirroring PR-001 `preferencesStorage`, keyed `cdiscourse:admin-arguments-prefs:admin`), `useAdminArgumentsPrefs.ts` hook (load on mount, optimistic `updatePref` + best-effort save). `AdminArgumentsTab.tsx` now derives sort/limit/runTag/density from the persisted prefs (local sort/limit useState removed) and routes every change through `updatePref` so the choice survives a remount. New density control (comfortable/compact) drives cell padding via the model helper. New AsyncStorage key `adminArgumentsPrefsKey` in `sessionKeys.ts`. DEFERRED (persisted-but-inert / not built; pending operator decisions): classifier-COVERAGE column (PHASE7-OBSERVATION-001 / Blocker B3 — client-RLS vs new Edge action); bot/human FILTER (Blocker B1 — confirm the `profiles.is_bot` column name; `participantKind` is in the persisted schema with honest "Bot / human filter coming later." copy but drives no active filter in v1); coverage band thresholds (Blocker B4). +4 test suites / +54 tests: `adminArgumentsRunTagModel.test.ts`, `adminArgumentsPrefsModel.test.ts`, `useAdminArgumentsPrefs.test.tsx` (AsyncStorage persist+restore round-trip), `AdminArgumentsTab.runtagPrefs.test.tsx` (source-shape testIDs/a11y/plain-language/no-verdict). 3 existing `adminArguments.test.ts` assertions updated in place (not relaxed) to match the equivalent prefs-routed sort wiring. Test delta (full suite, captured exit 0): 647 → 651 suites / 19559 → 19613 passing / 1 skipped (unchanged) → 19614 total (+4 suites / +54 passing). Typecheck + lint clean. OPERATOR FOLLOW-UP: client-only → autonomous green squash-merge permitted; resolve B1 (bot column name) to un-defer the bot/human filter, B3/B4 for the coverage column. NO push/PR/merge by Claude, NO Edge, NO migration, NO Supabase write, NO service-role, NO provider call, NO new dependency, NO existing test relaxed, NO secret printed. -->
<!-- Latest implementer card: OPS-ADMIN-ARGS-PROFILES-EMBED-001 (production hotfix) — Admin → Arguments tab was BROKEN. #480 (ADMIN-ARGS-INACTIVE-001) added a second FK from `public.arguments` to `public.profiles` (`inactive_by` → `arguments_inactive_by_fkey`), so the loader's bare `profiles(display_name)` embed became ambiguous and PostgREST refused it ("Could not embed because more than one relationship was found for 'arguments' and 'profiles'"), failing the entire tab. FIX: one-line change in `src/features/admin/adminArgumentsApi.ts` — pin the author FK: `profiles!arguments_author_id_fkey(display_name)` (mirrors the `point_tags` FK-pinning idiom in `adminMetadataEventsApi.ts`). The returned JSON key stays `profiles`, so `asDisplayName(r.profiles)` is unchanged. We do NOT embed the inactivator's profile (doctrine §10a). `inactive_by` stays a scalar column + FK (intended; no migration). Repo-wide sweep confirmed this was the ONLY ambiguous arguments↔profiles embed (Edge `admin-users` queries arguments + profiles separately; argument-room `ARG_SELECT` is scalar-only). Regression test added in `__tests__/adminArguments.test.ts` (fails pre-fix, passes post-fix: requires the FK-pinned embed, forbids the bare embed). Suite: full `npm run test` = 19540 passing of 19541 (1 pre-existing flaky perf-timing assertion in `moveMetadataLedger.test.ts`, passes in isolation at 10ms; unrelated to this change), 1 skipped, 646 suites; the +1 net new admin-arguments regression test is folded into the existing adminArguments suite. typecheck + lint clean. NO migration / Edge deploy / Supabase write / service-role / provider call by Claude. -->
<!-- Latest implementer card: OPS-MCP-OBSERVABILITY-002 (#470) — admin classifier-health panel (Edge GATE-C; merge = deploy → operator-only). The FIRST READER of the `failure_detail` jsonb column (write-only until now). Acceptance-gate invariant (binding, verbatim): AI/MCP classifiers MUST NEVER be the submission acceptance gate. The deterministic rules engine, src/lib/constitution/engine.ts, is the sole gate. Classifiers run after an argument is stored. No path may block, reject, route, or delay an ordinary user post. This panel is an OPERATIONAL DIAGNOSTIC READ surface — no write path (except the admin audit row), no re-trigger, no routing control, no productionEnabled flip; it cannot block/route/delay any user post. SURFACE = Edge read function + pure-TS model + admin UI tab. NEW pure-TS model src/features/adminClassifierHealth/** (types.ts leak-safe row shape [column allow-list incl. RunRowFailureDetail keys ONLY — validator_path/reason/family/correlation_id/attempt_count/run_mode/schema_version], classifierHealthModel.ts counts-only aggregation [group by status/state/failure_reason/failure_sub_reason/dead_letter_reason/run_mode/family/failure_detail.reason] + completed_at|started_at UTC time window [Q6] + provider-error cluster [Q5: mcp_api_error/mcp_network_error/provider_server_error] + H/I/J frozen-family leakage tripwire [production-SUCCESS only; FROZEN_NON_PRODUCTION_FAMILIES = claim_clarity/thread_topology/sensitive_composer mirrors familyRegistry productionEnabled:false; pinned to ALL_MACHINE_OBSERVATION_FAMILIES], classifierHealthPlainLanguage.ts [gameCopy.toPlainLanguage first → panel-local admin transport map → unknown SUPPRESSED, §9], classifierHealthCsv.ts metadata-only CSV [same field allow-list], runTagSource.ts [RunTagSource seam + title-suffix heuristic `[<runTag> tNN]` mirroring conversationGalleryModel SUFFIX_TAG_PATTERNS — Q3 heuristic, swap to durable run_tag column when #476 lands]). NEW Edge supabase/functions/admin-classifier-health/index.ts (requireAdmin gate 401/403; strict zod filter [supabase/functions/_shared/adminClassifierHealthSchemas.ts — z.strictObject, unknown keys REJECTED]; COLUMN-EXPLICIT service-role aggregate read [status, state, failure_reason, failure_sub_reason, dead_letter_reason, run_mode, requested_families, family, started_at, completed_at, failure_detail] — NEVER SELECT *, NEVER body, NEVER join argument_machine_observation_results, NEVER evidence_span; failure_detail read strictly through the RunRowFailureDetail allow-list; debates(title) joined ONLY for the runTag heuristic [title only]; aggregate via the pure-TS model; containsForbiddenSubstring [mirrors cutover-health-monitor] scrub on json + csv before return; admin_audit_events insert [Q4 — actor + filter params + result count ONLY, never row contents]) + config.toml (verify_jwt = true). NEW admin UI src/features/admin/AdminClassifierHealthTab.tsx (read-only panel: filter form [TextInput, not actions], counts summary, provider-error cluster row, H/I/J leakage tripwire [informational badge + count-should-be-0, frozen-set badge, no control], CSV download; NULL columns render "—" never "null"/"undefined"; a11y role=button + hitSlop 44x44 on every Pressable; doctrine footnote: panel never gates a user post) + adminClassifierHealthApi.ts (typed read-only wrapper, no service key, no mutation verb). <!-- Latest implementer card: CORPUS-30-DIVERSITY-001 (#468) — voice-distribution reporter band RECALIBRATED to PLANNER REALITY (operator-decided axis (ii): reporter-only; the planner corpusPoolDrivenPlanner.js assignVoiceId is BYTE-EQUAL — NO planner change, confirmed git diff main empty). Dev-tooling; allowlist scripts/bot-fixtures/** + __tests__/** + this file only. Confined to the synthetic-corpus dev runner + its §9 reporter twins — NO submission path: AI/MCP classifiers MUST NEVER be the submission acceptance gate; src/lib/constitution/engine.ts is the sole gate; classifiers run after an argument is stored; no path may block/reject/route/delay an ordinary user post. PROBLEM: the old hardcoded voice band `count < 5 || count > 12` in BOTH twins was tuned for a per-slot distribution the per-bot-account planner never emits — with B fixed bot accounts over N rooms, assignVoiceId(runId, botUserId) deterministically yields B distinct voices each at count=N, so all B landed out-of-band → a FALSE YELLOW on a healthy planner. FIX (both twins, byte-equivalent): new recalibrateVoiceBand() derives expectation FROM THE STREAM, not a hardcoded slot count — expectedPerVoice = totalVoiceAssignments / distinctVoiceCount; expectedDistinctVoices = max voice-bearing assignments seen in any single room (the room bot cardinality). The synthesizer IS a real voice-bearing bot account (3rd persona) and COUNTS as a voice (nothing hardcoded to 3). §4-T BAND-RECALIBRATION, NOT BAND-REMOVAL — two independent teeth keep the band able to FIRE: Tooth A per-voice material deviation (below expectedPerVoice*0.5 or above *2.0 → YELLOW; catches a wildly imbalanced split); Tooth B distinct-voice collapse (distinctVoiceCount below the per-room cardinality → YELLOW; a RUN-WIDE collapse to ≤1 voice across ≥2 rooms → RED; a single-room collapse stays YELLOW so the pre-existing 1-room collision guard is preserved). GREEN only on the planner honest distribution (e.g. 3 voices each at 30 over a 30-room stream). n/a-on-empty HARD GUARD: severityBand `n/a` reason `attribution_absent` (NEVER green) when the bot_assignment/voice stream is empty or any entry lacks voiceId — mirrors the repeatedOption/spineSaturation/samey-move attribution_absent posture #467 added. TWIN-LOCKSTEP: report twin voiceDistributionFromEvents() rewritten to the SAME collision algorithm (one collision per (scenario,voiceId) pair) + SAME band helper + SAME n/a-on-empty gate as runner checkVoiceDistribution(); the redundant n/a wrapper in aggregateDiversityChecks removed (it owned a divergent collision count); the two helpers now return BYTE-IDENTICAL output for the same event stream (lockstep tests assert JSON equality on honest/collapse/imbalanced/empty). SPINE REFRAME (documentation only — NO spine band change): both Markdown renderers gain a note "spines are stricter than voices — within-thread repeats are expected by pigeonhole (9 spines × ~10 moves/thread); not a regression"; spine catalogue widening is a separate follow-up CORPUS-SPINE-CATALOG-EXPANSION (NOT implemented). #467 HUNKS INTACT (NOT reverted): the fallback-reason histogram + samey-move token-set Jaccard + attribution-gated quality thresholds in both twins are untouched — git diff main on xaiAdversarialReport.js shows ONLY voice-band + spine-comment changes. BYTE-EQUAL preserved: corpusPoolDrivenPlanner.js (assignVoiceId/assignSpineId), corpusPoolDrivenPlannerConstants.js (VOICES=8 / SPINES=9 catalogues — NOT expanded), scripts/engagement-intelligence/**, supabase/**, src/**, app/**, familyRegistry.ts (H/I/J productionEnabled:false). No dissent/redaction/ban-list change (operator policy_no_censorship). NEW test suite __tests__/corpusVoiceAssignmentDiversity.test.ts (+14 tests): GREEN-on-honest (3 voices × 30) + GREEN at a different size (×12) + RED-on-degenerate-collapse + YELLOW-on-imbalanced-Tooth-A + n/a-on-empty + n/a-on-missing-voiceId + twin-lockstep ×4 (honest/collapse/imbalanced/empty JSON equality) + determinism + Markdown surfaces recalibrated band + spine note + planner assignVoiceId byte-equal/deterministic. One pre-existing test (xaiAdversarialReport.diversity-checks.test.ts "voice-distribution check flags out-of-band voice counts") kept GREEN by the 1-room-collapse-stays-YELLOW gate — NOT modified, NOT weakened (§4-A). Test delta (full suite, captured exit 0): 633 → 634 suites / 19318 → 19332 passing / 1 skipped / 19319 → 19333 total (+1 suite / +14 passing). No test removed or skipped. Typecheck + lint clean. Allowlist boundary: ONLY scripts/bot-fixtures/{runXaiAdversarialBotCorpus,xaiAdversarialReport}.js + __tests__/corpusVoiceAssignmentDiversity.test.ts + docs/core/current-status.md touched; no planner/src/supabase/Edge/DB/migration/provider change; no submit-argument/validator change; H/I/J productionEnabled untouched; no corpus re-run; no policy_no_censorship suppression; no secret printed. NO push, NO PR, NO deploy. -->
<!-- Latest implementer card: CORPUS-30-QUALITY-001 (#467) — fallback-reason histogram + samey-move token-set Jaccard + attribution-gated reporter thresholds (dev-tooling; allowlist scripts/bot-fixtures/** + __tests__/** + this file only). Confined to the synthetic-corpus dev runner + its §9 reporter twins — NO submission path: AI/MCP classifiers MUST NEVER be the submission acceptance gate; src/lib/constitution/engine.ts is the sole gate; classifiers run after an argument is stored; no path may block/reject/route/delay an ordinary user post. New fallbackReasonHistogram(events) in BOTH twins (runner + xaiAdversarialReport.js) buckets each issue token on its PREFIX only (before the first ':') so no user-label value / option-spine id payload reaches committable Markdown (doctrine §1/§9/§10a) — full <reason>:<id> stays only in the gitignored JSONL; returns sorted [reasonPrefix,count][] + totalFallback + nonSeedMoveCount + dominantReason; new "### Fallback reason histogram" Markdown subsection in both report paths. (b) SAMEY-MOVE: computeMoveBodySampleHash now also returns a body-free hashed-shingle fingerprint tokenHashes (set of 8-hex sha256 per-token prefixes, deduped+sorted; non-reversible; order destroyed) + one positional openingTokenHash; emitMoveBodySample writes both (additive, back-compat — tokenSetHash+tokenCount retained). checkSameyMove (runner) + sameyMoveFromEvents (twin) REWRITTEN: the clone-only exact-tokenSetHash equality with `const yellow=false` + literal overallMean/maxIntraThreadMean:0 is REPLACED by a REAL token-set Jaccard over tokenHashes (high pair ≥0.60; yellow when either mean >0.35; real means computed); the YELLOW band is now reachable (mean 0.35–0.60, no high pair) and RED on clones/high pairs — verified. §4-T HARD GUARD: severityBand 'n/a' with reason 'insufficient_samples' + sampleCount when < 50 non-empty body samples; the metric NEVER reads green by absence; the guard applies to the live fingerprint path, the legacy strict-clone fallback (old JSONL without tokenHashes), AND the dev/dry bot_move_render path. Twin-parity tests assert identical severityBand/overallMean/maxIntraThreadMean for the same event stream. (c) THRESHOLDS: new qualityThresholds(events) in BOTH twins — deterministicFallbackPct (green ≤20 / yellow 20–40 / red >40; n/a when no non-seed move_validated), topOpeningPhrasePct (green <8 / yellow 8–15 / red >15; body-free positional openingTokenHash share; n/a when no opening signal), sameyMoveMean (derived from the §4-T-floored samey metric; n/a below 50) — each carries attributionPresent and renders n/a LITERALLY with its reason, never folded into green; new "### Quality thresholds" Markdown subsection in both report paths. BYTE-EQUAL preserved: the hardcoded 5..12 voice band in both twins (that's #468), corpusPoolDrivenPlanner.js voice/spine assignment, scripts/engagement-intelligence/xaiAdversarialCorpusReport.js, supabase/**, src/**, app/**, familyRegistry.ts. Runner does NOT read CLASSIFIER_QUEUE_ROUTING_* (unchanged). No dissent-detector tightening / semantic redaction / ban-list expansion (operator policy_no_censorship — hostile rhetoric is the corpus INPUT, not a defect). NEW test suites: __tests__/corpusFallbackHistogramAndSameyMove.test.ts (histogram prefix-bucketing + no-leak + twin-lockstep + real-Jaccard means + YELLOW/RED reachable + green-on-empty HARD GUARD at 49 vs 50 vs 0 + determinism) and __tests__/xaiAdversarialReport.quality-thresholds.test.ts (3 bands × green/yellow/red/n/a + attribution gate + twin-lockstep + full-report Markdown integration). Existing samey/diversity tests updated to the corrected contract (≥50 samples to read a band; below 50 is n/a, never green — a §4-T bar-raise, not a bar-lowering).
